VSL IS CO2 FITTED

CEMENT HOLES
SPEED / CONS
SPEED AND DAILY BUNKER CONSUMPTION AT SEA BASIS UNDER GOOD WEATHER AND SEA CONDITIONS UPTO BFS4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH
NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL EXISTING AS FLWG.
(IFO 380CST – ISO 8217 2010 – RMG 380)
(MGO – ISO 8217 2010 - DMA MAX 0,1% SULPHUR CONTENT)
EPL SPEEDS
LADEN: ABT 11.50 KN ON ABT 23 MT IFO + ABT 0,1 MT MDO    BALLAST: ABT 12.00 KN ON ABT 23 MT IFO + ABT 0,1 MT MDO
IN PORT IDLE 3,0 MT IFO + 0,2 MDO/LSMGO
IN PORT WORKING 5,0 MT IFO + 0,2 MT MDO/LSMGO BSS CRANE WORKING
ABT MEANS +/- 0.5KNOT IN SPEED AND +/- 5% IN BUNKER CONSUMPTION BOTH IFO AND MDO ARRANGED BY CHARTERERS UNDER THIS CONTRACT TO BE
IN ACCORDANCE WITH RMG 380 RESPECTIVELY DMB SPECIFIED IN ISO 8217 AND ANNEX VI OF MARPOL 73/78 REGULATION 14 WHICH HAS COME INTO FORCE FROM 19TH MAY 2005.
THE VSL ENTITLE TO USE MDO FOR MANEUOUVERING IN NARROW A/O SHALLOW A/O BUSY WATER AREA, CANALS A/O RIVERS, ALSO IN AND OUT OF EACH PORTS,
ENGINE STARTING AND STOPPING, BALLASTING AND DE-BALLASTING OPERATION, AND BURNING OF SLUDGE OIL BY INCINERATOR.
ULO (USED LUBRICATION OIL) OR OTHER WASTE PRODUCTS ARE STRICTLY NOT PERMITTED AND NOT TO BE INCLUDED IN THE BUNKERS SUPPLIES.
GOOD WEATHER CONDITION BASIS EVEN KEEL, 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS ( FROM NOON TO NOON ), NO ADVERSE CURRENT, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, BEAUFORT SCALE 4 , DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3
DEFINED AS SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT UP TO 1.25 METERS. ALWAYS EXCLUDING PERIODS DURING
WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, REDUCED VISIBILITY, STEAMING AND/OR MANEUVERING IN CONGESTED WATERS/STRAITS, IN/OUT PORTS ETC.
POSITIVE CURRENT SHALL NOT BE USED IN DIMINISHING VESSEL PERFORMANCE.
COST AND TIME (INCLUDING ANY DEVIATION TIME REQUIRED TO MEET SECA REQUIREMENTS AND/OR
NATIONAL REGULATIONS IN OPERATION IN PORTS TO WHICH VESSEL IS BOUND) INCL BALLAST EXCHANGE TO BE FOR CHARTERERS\' ACCOUNT. ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY
REDUCTION IN SPEED, ANY SAVING IN TIME MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION, ANY SAVING IN FO MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST INCREASED MDO AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY OVERALL SAVING   ON INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S) MUST BE SET OFF AGAINST AN OVERALL LOSS ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S).
VESSEL MAY BURN MDO / MGO/ LSMGO IN CASE OF EMERGENCY, DURING MANEUVERING, WHEN
NAVIGATING IN NARROW AND / OR SHALLOW AND/ OR RESTRICTED WATERS AND/ OR IN/ OUT OF PORTS AND/ OR RIVERS AND IF REQUIRED BY LOCAL AND / OR EMISSION LAWS.
ALL ABOVE FIGURES ARE ABOUT, WHICH MEANS HAVING BOTH AN ALLOWANCE OF 0.5KN ON SPEED AND 5% ON BUNKERS OVER-CONSUMPTION, IN OWNERS FAVOUR.
ALL ABOVE FIGURES ARE INCLUSIVE OF AUXILIARY ENGINES.
NO MIXING OF BUNKERS IS ALLOWED AND BUNKER SUPPLY IS ALLOWED UP TO 85% OF INDIVIDUAL TANK CAPACITY. BUNKER TANK RESERVED FOR ECA COMPLIANT FUEL CANNOT ACCOMMODATE IFO 380 CST.
ALL DETAILS ARE ABOUT
